description: Import, organize, and install AI agent skills from an Obsidian vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: DrBanshan
manifest.description: Import, organize, and install AI agent skills from a vault.
manifest.name: Banshan Skill Hub

name: Banshan Skill Hub

releases.author: DrBanshan
releases.description:
# Banshan Skill Hub 0.2.0

This release introduces a redesigned skill library focused on clearer organization, smoother imports, and faster installation workflows.

## Highlights

- Added folder-style bundles that automatically group skills from the same GitHub repository, local scan, or npx command.
- Added expandable collection folders with full skill cards, tags, actions, and drag-to-reorder support.
- Added folder pinning, custom ordering, editing, details, installation, and confirmed deletion.
- Added support for importing a root-level `SKILL.md` from GitHub without downloading the full repository.
- Fixed single-skill imports and display them as standalone blocks instead of folders.
- Added individual and bulk installation for skills, bundles, and collections.
- Improved selection visibility and automatically clear selections when leaving selection mode.
- Fixed installation into empty target directories and creation of `.agents/skills`.
- Improved native directory selection, panel colors, card outlines, spacing, and responsive folder expansion.

Requires Obsidian 1.13.0 or later.
releases.name: Release - 0.2.0

releases.author: DrBanshan
releases.description:
## Initial Release 0.1.0

Banshan Skill Hub is now available as a desktop plugin for importing, organizing, and installing AI agent skills from a vault-managed library.

This first release includes GitHub, local folder, and `npx skills add ...` import flows; visual skill cards with tags, colors, emojis, and details; workflow collections with drag-and-drop ordering; and copy or symlink installation into `.agents/skills`.

It also includes configurable skill storage, install behavior, npx execution, custom sorting, and collection-based bulk install workflows.
releases.name: Release - 0.1.0
